patches.hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because the method attempts to call getClass() on a null element in the input array. We need to add a null check before calling getClass().

The NullPointerException occurs because the method attempts to call getClass() on a null element in the input array. We need to handle null elements in the array by inserting null into the resulting Class array.
patches.changes:
- classes[i] = array[i].getClass();
+ classes[i] = array[i] == null ? null : array[i].getClass();
